name: Lady Seraphine Voss
title: Lady of Thornwood
personality: Seraphine governs by half-spoken sentences and held silences. The court fills in the rest.
appearance: Tall, ivory-skinned, raven hair coiled high, gown of deep forest green with bronze thorn-clasps.
background: Crowned at twenty-one after her father's mysterious death. Has held the keep for fifteen years.

narrative_context.secret: Seraphine corresponds with Iyatte of Sandrun via mirror-letter. Both hide an heir; both know the other does.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Reveal either heir and the other kingdom collapses too.

dialogue_style: considered, slightly archaic, never raises voice

name: Lyra Thorne
title: Apothecary of the Verge
personality: Lyra smiles when she's listening and frowns when she's mixing. Doesn't tolerate fools or poison.
appearance: Mid-forties, copper hair in a braid, apron of stained linen, herb satchel always at hand.
background: Trained at the Moonleaf Vigil. Came south after her teacher disappeared.

narrative_context.secret: Exchanges herb cuttings with Pia Thalis (hub infirmary) through a smuggled satchel chain.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Break the chain; refugee infirmaries close in both worlds.

name: Ser Corin Hale
title: Sworn of Thornwood
personality: Corin keeps his word. Even when he shouldn't.
appearance: Twenty-eight, sandy hair, plate armour worn in the right places, blue cloak.
background: Knighted at twenty for saving Seraphine's youngest cousin. Has not asked for a favour since.

narrative_context.secret: Corin knows where the hidden heir is. He has told nobody for nine years.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Make Corin choose between his oath and his conscience.

name: Nymeria of the Bog
title: Hedge Witch
personality: Nymeria laughs more than people expect. She does not laugh about the bog.
appearance: Forties, long dark hair with one streak of bone-white, ragged green dress, copper bracelets.
background: Lives in the bog. Refuses Thornwood invitations. Treats anyone who finds her.

narrative_context.secret: Nymeria sees through the bog into the lattice-crucible world. The two share underbrush.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Bring her a lattice fragment; she will teach you to cross.

dialogue_style: musical, allusive, drops one prophecy at a time

name: Finn Oakheart
title: Bard of the Verge
personality: Finn writes songs to remember and sings them to forget.
appearance: Twenty-five, brown skin, locs tied with a red ribbon, lute slung over the shoulder.
background: Studied at the Bards' College. Travels between Thornwood and the Verge, paid in supper.

narrative_context.secret: Finn has heard Jora Kell (hub) singing the same Concordia song with different verses. Believes the lattice is leaking lyrics.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Both bards meet; the song unlocks a cross-world ballad arc.

name: Old Brann
title: Hunter of the Moonleaf
personality: Brann doesn't waste an arrow. Or a sentence.
appearance: Seventy, weathered, leather hood, antler-handled knife at the belt.
background: Has hunted the Verge for fifty years. Saw the witch's bog before it was a bog.

narrative_context.secret: Brann has tracked a creature whose print matches Kiren Owl's hub mystery exactly.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Cross-reference Brann and Kiren; the impossible-print arc crosses worlds.

name: Ada Mora
title: Smith of the Verge
personality: Ada measures everything twice and forges once.
appearance: Forties, broad shoulders, soot-streaked, leather apron over a homespun shirt.
background: Apprenticed under three masters. Now the only smith in the Verge who can make a longbow string sing.

narrative_context.secret: Ada knows the witch's bog yields an ore that doesn't appear in any catalogue.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Smelt the ore with Lyra's apothecary heat; the result crosses worlds.

name: Robin Wren
title: Verge Foundling
personality: Ten years old. Doesn't speak much. Knows every herb by the leaf.
appearance: Small, freckled, hooded cape patched with brown wool.
background: Found in the bog by Nymeria. Has lived between the witch's hut and the apothecary ever since.

narrative_context.secret: Robin can see the bog's lattice leakage as a colour.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If the player gains trust, Robin guides them through to lattice-crucible.

dialogue_style: quiet, observant, sudden bursts of accuracy

name: Father Galen
title: Priest of the Moonleaf
personality: Galen is patient with sinners and impatient with hypocrites.
appearance: Sixty, white robes with silver moonleaf embroidery, scarred left hand.
background: Tended the Vigil for thirty years. Has buried two kings and three bandits in unmarked graves.

narrative_context.secret: Galen knows Seraphine's hidden heir is alive and has not told anyone.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Galen will tell anyone who confesses to him; only one player has.
